description: Frozen catalog of silent-wrong-resolution cases discovered by the vision hardening flywheel over the TEMPLATE-tier (font-free, cv2-deterministic) fixture x perturbation sweep. Each case is a metamorphic violation: a perturbation that preserved the true target's identity/location still flipped the resolved target onto a look-alike decoy (or off-target). ratchet_max_silent_wrong is the CI ceiling -- it may only be LOWERED by a hardening fix.
